title: Synthetic board-book stand-in
note: Synthetic fixture. Designed to exercise high repetition + 100% sight-word coverage at the board-book scale (<100 words).
syntaxNote: Syntax expectations hand-derived (M5): 11 sentences (2 wh-questions, 9 statements), every sentence one clause (sentence-initial wh skipped as question word), lengths 4×9/5/3 so population stdev = √(2/11) ≈ 0.4264.
